name: West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd.
description: West Red Lake Gold Mines is a gold producer operating the Madsen Mine in the Red Lake district of Ontario, Canada, which achieved commercial production in early 2026. The company is advancing a phased integration strategy combining the Madsen Mine with its adjacent Rowan Project, targeting approximately 120,000 ounces of gold per annum over a four-year growth plan. West Red Lake is positioned as a growing mid-tier gold producer within one of Canada's premier gold-mining jurisdictions.
